problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile runtime authorization path needs a schema-backed approval witness template that defines the exact future signed approval evidence without collecting approval, accepting generic continuation, or granting runtime authority.
success_criteria: a deterministic validator emits a runtime authorization approval witness template from the current runtime authorization request and generic continuation rejection witness
the checked-in local approval witness template matches the deterministic produced template
the schema records AwaitingEvidence and TemplateNoEffect for the approval template
the template binds the source runtime authorization request id and hash
the template binds the source generic continuation rejection id and hash
the template records that signed approval remains absent, approval witness collection remains false, and runtime authorization gate remains unsatisfied

focused tests cover schema compatibility, fixture parity, source binding, required approval fields, authority-drift rejection, approval-collection drift rejection, generic-continuation acceptance rejection, source-boundary drift rejection, and CLI JSON output
non_goals: do not record a signed operator approval witness
do not accept generic continuation as approval
do not execute, dispatch, replan, replay, or rollback
do not add a router, worker, scheduler, connector, or runtime registration path
do not claim live runtime activation
do not replace the runtime authorization request or generic continuation rejection witness
constraints: the approval witness template is local, read-only, deterministic, and reversible
the template is not accepted as approval
explicit signed approval remains required before the runtime authorization gate can be satisfied
runtime activation remains denied until a separate governed activation action is approved
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the validator does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: schema-backed local approval witness template fixture
deterministic validator and produced template parity
SDLC design and security review artifacts
